payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the newer, current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded and therefore not eligible as the active recall result.
payload.decision: Return mem_new as the current memory for Sam from Goldman; filter out mem_old because it has been superseded by the newer record.

entity_resolution.reason: The recall matched Sam at Goldman but selected the newer memory card because it supersedes the older one.

payload.intent: Explain recall filtering for Sam from Goldman, specifically why the newer memory was returned and the older one was excluded as superseded.

memory_cards.statement: Sam from Goldman is represented by mem_new as the latest applicable memory.
mem_old was excluded because it is superseded and should not be treated as current.

repair_options: Keep mem_new as the canonical current memory for Sam from Goldman.
Archive or mark mem_old as superseded so future recall continues to prefer mem_new.

raw_text: {"intent":"Explain recall filtering for Sam from Goldman, specifically why the newer memory was returned and the older one was excluded as superseded.","decision":"Return mem_new as the current memory for Sam from Goldman; filter out mem_old because it has been superseded by the newer record.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"current_memory","statement":"Sam from Goldman is represented by mem_new as the latest applicable memory.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"affiliation"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"affiliated_with","object":"Goldman"},{"subject":"mem_new","predicate":"supersedes","object":"mem_old"}]},{"kind":"obsolete_memory","statement":"mem_old was excluded because it is superseded and should not be treated as current.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"affiliation"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"mem_old","predicate":"superseded_by","object":"mem_new"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"resolve_to_current_record","entity_id":null,"reason":"The recall matched Sam at Goldman but selected the newer memory card because it supersedes the older one."},"conflict_classification":"supersession","answer":"Recall returned mem_new because it is the newer, current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded and therefore not eligible as the active recall result.","citations":["mem_new","mem_old"],"repair_options":["Keep mem_new as the canonical current memory for Sam from Goldman.","Archive or mark mem_old as superseded so future recall continues to prefer mem_new."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["mem_new selected","mem_old filtered as superseded","current-state memory preserved"]}}
